series_metadata.series_title: CONTINUING EDUCATION REPORT FORMS AND DOCUMENTATION
series_metadata.series_description: The continuing education application shows the basis of continuing education credits for maintaining CPA or PA license, including Continuing Education Report forms, certificates of completion or other verification of continuing education completed for the reporting timeframe, submitted either at the time of license renewal, upon request for a practicing permit, or for continuing education verification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until scanned or for three years after new form is submitted ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
